title: Mpfumelelo wa xikhukhi
Cookie consent
e602cb0a14375b07effaac0d79fe4df8
aqtv2_en_bandagedclamtombgiftsqkkll_fg2fm8mb2_ftflt_20220628-1854.md
text: Wedingo yi tirhisa vuhlayiselo bya laha kaya lebyi lavekaka leswaku xirhambo xi tirha (ku hlayisa nkarhi wa wena na swihlawulekisi).
Wedingo uses local storage necessary for the invitation to function (saving your session and preferences).

privacyPolicy: Mulawuri wa datha: Adrián Carrasco López.
termsText: Hi ku tirhisa Wedingo u amukela swipimelo leswi.
By using Wedingo you accept these terms.
legalText: Hi ku landza milawu leyi tirhaka, ku nyikiwa rungula leri landzelaka:
In compliance with applicable laws, the following information is provided:

You must accept the Privacy Policy to create the invitation.
usernameRequired: Nghenisa vito ra mutirhisi leswaku u ta kota ku nghena endzhaku.

usernameInvalid: Vito ra mutirhisi ri nga va na maletere na tinomboro ntsena.

minuteInvalid: Timinetse ti fanele ku va exikarhi ka 00 na 59.

The year cannot be later than {{year}}.

coverFirst: Xifunengeto xi fanele xi va xiyenge xo sungula.
The cover must be the first section.
menuRequired: Hlamusela kwalomu ka menu yin’we leyikulu (nyama, nhlampfi kumbe vegan).
Describe at least one main menu (meat, fish or vegan).

title: Rhekhodo ya migingiriko ya vufambisi (Art. 30 GDPR) .
Record of processing activities (Art. 30 GDPR)
e602cb0a14375b07effaac0d79fe4df8
aqtv2_en_bandagedclamtombgiftsqkkll_fg2fm8mb2_ftflt_20220628-1854.md
updated: Updated: July 2026. Rhekhodo leyi yi tsala migingiriko ya vukorhokeri bya data ya munhu hi xiyexe eWedingo.
Updated: July 2026. This record documents personal data processing activities in Wedingo.
row1Data: Mavito ya mpatswa, siku, ndhawu, nhlokomhaka, swifaniso, vuyimbeleri, menyu, swiyenge
Couple names, date, venue, theme, photos, music, menu, sections
row1Purpose: Endla ni ku endla leswaku xirhambo xa mucato xi va xa wena
row1Retention: Loko akhawunti yi ri karhi yi tirha
row1Recipients: Google Cloud (Ku vuyisa ndzilo, ku rhurhela) .
row2Data: Vito ra muyeni, ku va kona (ina/e-e), ku hlawuriwa ka menyu, aleriji, datha ya rihanyo
Guest name, attendance (yes/no), menu selection, allergies, health data
row2Purpose: Lawula nxaxamelo wa vaendzi na menyu
row2Retention: Endzhaku ka tin’hweti ta 12 endzhaku ka xiendlakalo lexi
row3Retention: Endzhaku ka tin’hweti ta 12 endzhaku ka xiendlakalo lexi
row4Data: Xikombiso xa nkarhi, vito ra mutirhisi ra admin
row4Purpose: Lawula ku nghena eka phanele ya admin
Control access to the admin panel
row5Data: Swiendlo swa Superadmin, tithokini leti tirhisiweke, swirhambo leswi susiweke
Superadmin actions, used tokens, deleted invitations
internationalTitle: Ku hundziseriwa ka matiko ya misava
internationalText: Data yi hlayisiwa eka tisevha ta Google Cloud eka xifundzha xa eur3 (Frankfurt, Germany).
Data is stored on Google Cloud servers in the eur3 region (Frankfurt, Germany).
scc: Swiyenge swa Kontiraka ya Xiyimo xa le Henhla (SCC) - Xiboho xo Tirhisa xa 2021/914
dpf: Rimba ra Vuhlayiseki bya Data (DPF) EU-US, UK-US na Switzerland-US
Data Privacy Framework (DPF) EU-US, UK-US and Switzerland-US
measureEncryption: Ku fihla ka AES-256-GCM ka swifaniso na datha ya nkoka (PBKDF2) .
AES-256-GCM encryption of images and sensitive data (PBKDF2)
measureTls: Ku hlanganisiwa ka HTTPS (TLS 1.3) eka pulatifomo hinkwayo
HTTPS connection (TLS 1.3) across the entire platform
measureFirestore: Milawu ya vuhlayiseki bya xitolo xa ndzilo (vulawuri bya mfikelelo lebyi simekiweke eka nkarhi) .
measureStorage: Vuhlayiselo bya laha kaya byintsongo hi mpfumelelo ntsena
Minimal local storage with consent only
measureRetention: Pholisi yo hlayisa: 12 wa tinhweti endzhaku ka xiendlakalo xa datha ya vaendzi
Retention policy: 12 months post-event for guest data
measureSuperadmin: Superadmin yi sirheleriwa hi Firebase Authentication + ndlela leyi fihliweke
Superadmin protected by Firebase Authentication + hidden route

golden: Elegant and bright, na ti accents ta nsuku.
Elegant and bright, with golden accents.
forest: Ntumbuluko na sober na rihlaza ro olova.
Natural and sober with soft greens.
rose: Ku kufumela no olova, na mihlovo ya pink.
Warm and delicate, with pink hues.
linen-soft: Ku olova naswona ku nga ri na vukalatlhelo, na vukona byo rhula na lebyi nga hundzeriwiki hi nkarhi.
Light and neutral, with a serene and timeless presence.
blush-pearl: Ku olova na rirhandzu, na tithoni ta pink ta perela.
Soft and romantic, with pearly pink tones.
lavender-mist: Yitsakama naswona yi rhulile, yina mihlovo ya lavender na mauve.
Fresh and serene, with lavender and mauve hues.
champagne-bubble: Ku vangama naswona ku ri ni nkhuvo, ku ri ni swiphepherhele swo kufumela swa nsuku.
Bright and festive, with warm golden sparkles.
amber-night: Munyama naswona wu sasekile, wu ri na swilo leswikulu swa amber na nsuku.
Dark and elegant, with amber and gold highlights.
onyx-gold: Yi dzikile naswona yi rharhanganile, yi ri na nsuku lowukulu eka xivumbeko xa ntima.
Deep and sophisticated, with intense gold on dark background.
midnight-royal: Muhlovo wa wasi wo dzwihala swinene na nsuku lowukulu na vukona byo xiximeka.
Very dark blue with intense gold and solemn presence.
burgundy-velvet: Yi kufumela naswona yi funengetiwile, yi ri na vhinyo yo tshwuka na swiphepherhele swa nsuku.
Warm and enveloping, with red wine and golden sparkles.
sapphire-night: Deep blue na ti silver accents na vukona byo rhula.
Deep blue with silver accents and serene presence.
emerald-grove: Rihlaza ra ntumbuluko leri dzikeke leri nga ni mihlovo ya nsuku ni yo saseka.
Deep natural green with golden and elegant hues.
plum-twilight: Intense purple na pink na swivoni swa rirhandzu.
Intense purple with pink and romantic sparkles.
rainbow: Ku tlangela rirhandzu ro hambana-hambana hi mihlovo ya ntima.
Celebration of diverse love with rainbow colors.
trans: Blue, pink na white ku xixima mujeko wa trans.
Blue, pink and white in tribute to the trans flag.
nonbinary: Mujeko wo tshwuka, wo basa, wa xivunguvungu na wa ntima eka mujeko lowu nga riki wa binary.
Yellow, white, purple and black for the non-binary flag.
lesbian: Orange, yo basa na pink ya mujeko wa lesbian.
Orange, white and pink of the lesbian flag.
bi: Pink, purple na blue ya mujeko wa bi.
Pink, purple and blue of the bi flag.
pan: Pink, yellow na blue ya mujeko wa pani.
Pink, yellow and blue of the pan flag.
ace: Ntima, grey, wo basa na purple wa mujeko wa asexual.
Black, gray, white and purple of the asexual flag.

playArea: Mi amukeriwile hi ndhawu yo tlangela eka yona
